expectations.text: Mentions iterating over URLs in a loop or batch processing pattern
expectations.evidence: Only shows the monolithic CLI batch command; no loop or iteration pattern

expectations.text: Recommends try/except per paper for resilience (equivalent to --continue-on-error)

expectations.text: Explains how to re-run or debug individual failures
expectations.evidence: Only says '看输出的错误信息单独排查即可' without explaining re-run mechanics or debugging approach
